title: CSA Loom tier-router decision label row (E6)
description: One JSON object per JSONL line in content/evals/_tier-labels.jsonl. The copilot-evaluator tier mode runs the REAL model-tier-router (routeTurnTier) over each `prompt` and scores its ridden tier against `expectedTier` (the tier the labeled `taskClass` maps to under DEFAULT_TASK_TIER_MAP). '_'-prefixed, so the surface/search loaders and lint-eval-sets skip it. Azure-native, no Fabric dependency — the router is a pure Loom module.

prompt.description: The user turn the router classifies + routes.

expectedTier.description: Expected model tier from lib/foundry/model-tier-router.ts ModelTier.

taskClass.description: Expected task class from lib/foundry/model-tier-router.ts TaskClass.
